title: Chat Guides
description: Chat Guides Is Made For Bmc Mods, It Adds a Custom Type Combination To Bring Up Guides e.g. Bending, Claims, Chestshops ect.
body:
# Chat Guides

**Chat Guides** is built for BMC mods it adds quick, simple chat triggers that open helpful in-game guides.

**Now Also** Works In /msg And /r (Depends On Length Of Users)

Instead of remembering complicated commands, just type a keyword like 
```
:bend:
```
 or 
```
:claim:
```
 in chat and the correct guide will pop up instantly.

## ✨ Features

-  Fast access to server guides
  
-  Lightweight and easy to use
  
-  No command memorization

-  Case insensitive triggers

### 📘 Triggers
- 
```
Trigger	Opens

- :bend: Bending Guide
- :trust: Trust Guide
- :presets: Bending Preset Guide
- :chestshop: Chestshop Guide
- :lotus: Lotus Coins Guide
- :pwarp: Pwarp Guide
- :ranks: How to buy ranks Guide
- :sell: Selling Guide
- :claim: How To Claim Guide
- :tpa: Tpa Guide
- :guild: Guild Guide
- :buy: Buying Guide
- :homes: Homes Guide
- :skin: Skins Guide
- :ah: Auction House Guide
- :lotusshop: Lotusshop Guide
- :rankbending: Paid Ranks Bending options
- :start: Getting Started Guide
- :claimblocks: How To Get Claim Blocks Guide
- :duel: Duel Guide
- :tpprot: Tpa Protection Guide
- :gshop: Gshop Guide
- :econamy: Econamy Guide
- :qol: Quality Of Life Commands Guide
```
**As Seen Below:**
![The Bending Guide!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7241d2d3dbf893e4128f8a2b6f12e5a33f5b6178.png)
